sections.title: Title and extent of operation of Code
sections.content: This Act shall be called the Indian Penal Code, and shall extend to the whole of India.

sections.title: Punishment of offences committed within India
sections.content: Every person shall be liable to punishment under this Code for every act or omission contrary to the provisions thereof, of which he shall be guilty within India.

sections.title: Punishment of offences committed beyond, but which by law may be tried within India
sections.content: Any person liable, by any Indian law, to be tried for an offence committed beyond India, shall be dealt with according to the provisions of this Code for any act committed beyond India in the same manner as if such act had been committed within India.

sections.title: Extension of Code to extra-territorial offences
sections.content: The provisions of this Code apply to every person in any part of India, and also to any person on an Indian vessel or aircraft, in the same manner as if such person was in India.

sections.title: Certain laws not to be affected
sections.content: Nothing in this Code shall affect the provisions of any Act for the punishment of mutiny and desertion of officers, soldiers, sailors or airmen in the service of the Government of India.
